prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约10390→12732→15132→20314→23947，连续五年持续后移，累计后移约13557名；近3年每年后移幅度约2400–4800名，呈加速后移趋势；2025年基准约23947名；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年24人、2022年34人、2023年27人、2024年28人、2025年38人；2026年计划46人，较2025年扩 招约21%，为近年最大扩幅，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第82名，近年排名稳定在82–84区间，属于中上层次全国重点大 学；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级）；2026年声誉转为偏负面，涉及宿舍火灾等校园安全事件；抖音热度排名第11位（高热），短视频曝光量大 ，报考关注度较高；新闻传播学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校网络与新媒体、新闻学、广告学、传播学等招生专业直接对应，对文科方向考生吸引力强；物理 类招生专业以计算机、电子信息、人工智能为主，虽无A类学科评估，但契合当前工科热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年热度推荐但呈明显降温趋势；电子信息/通信类高热推荐且持续升温；新闻传播类2023年明显劝退，社会舆论偏负面。江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增长约46%；按历史比例估算物理类考生约38万人，竞争基数显著扩大；中国传媒大学位于北京，非江苏省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在江苏招生占比约2–3%（参考同类京校数据），跨省报考受地域偏好 影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次连续五年加速后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招21%缓解竞争、以及江苏省考生总数大幅增长约46%加剧竞争，三因素叠加：扩招效应（推高 位次数字）与考生激增效应（拉低位次数字）相互对冲，但扩招幅度（21%）小于考生增幅（约46%），且该校抖音高热、电子信息类专业热度持续升温，预计报考热度不减。，考虑考生激增和热度因素，预测最低位次约27000名，区间26500–27500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10390 → 12732 → 15132 → 20314 → 23947, continuously shifting backward for five consecutive years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13,557 places; in the past three years, the annual backward shift was about 2,400–4,800 places, showing an accelerating trend; the 2025 baseline is about 23,947 places; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu was 24 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 46, an increase of about 21% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 82nd in 2026, with stable rankings in the 82–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of national key universities; reputation in 2025 was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level); in 2026, reputation turned relatively negative, involving campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires; Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top in the country), directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Network and New Media, Journalism, Advertising, and Communication, strongly attracting liberal arts-oriented candidates; Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence, although without A-level discipline evaluations, they align with current popular engineering directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was recommended in 2024 but shows a clear cooling trend; Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended and continuously heating up; Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged in 2023, with negative public opinion. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (about 358,000); estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 380,000, with a significantly expanded competition base; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangsu, with no enrollment preference for this province; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 2–3% (referencing similar Beijing university data), and cross-province application is less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous acceleration of the Physics Category ranking backward trend over five years, the 21% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, and the significant 46% increase in total candidates in Jiangsu intensifying competition, the three factors overlap: the expansion effect (pushing ranking numbers higher) and the candidate surge effect (pulling ranking numbers lower) offset each other, but the expansion rate (21%) is less than the candidate growth rate (about 46%), and with the university's high Douyin heat and continuously rising popularity of Electronic Information majors, application enthusiasm is expected to remain high. Considering the candidate surge and popularity factors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 27,000, with a range of 26,500–27,500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 26,500–27,500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information), use Tier 1 popular majors (Digital Media Technology, Artificial Intelligence) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Advertising Dual Degree, Communication Studies, etc.) as a safe backup. Rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<26,500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; rankings close to the lower limit (>27,500) are advised to mainly target Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

新闻传播类2023年明显劝退，张雪峰等舆论持续看空，社会报考热度下降；汉语言文学2023年推荐，文科基础学科热度稳定。江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增长约46%；按历史比例估算历史类考生约14万人，竞争基数显著扩大；中国传媒大学位于北京，非江苏省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在江苏招生占比约2–3%，跨省报考受地域偏好影响较小。
8. 【预测结论】综合历史类位次近3年持续后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招7.7%缓解竞争、新闻传播学专业社会热度明显劝退降低报考意愿、以及江苏省考生总数大幅增长约46%加剧竞争 ，四因素叠加：扩招效应（推高位次数字）与考生激增效应（拉低位次数字）相互对冲，但新闻传播劝退效应（推高位次数字）较为显著。，考虑 专业劝退和考生激增因素，预测最低位次约3250名，区间2750–3750名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1447 → 1491 → 2229 → 3067 → 3092. In 2021–2022, it stabilized around 1500, dropped significantly to 2229 in 2023, and further dropped to about 3067–3092 in 2024–2025, with a cumulative drop of about 1863 places over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is about 3092. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 12 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, a slight expansion of about 7.7% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 82nd, with stable rankings in the 82–84 range in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of national key universities. In 2025, its reputation was positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++). In 2026, reputation turned negative due to campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires. It ranks 11th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and significant application attention. Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top nationally), directly corresponding to History Category majors like Network and New Media, Journalism, Advertising, and Digital Publishing, highlighting strong disciplinary advantages and strong appeal to liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Journalism and Communication majors saw a clear discouragement trend in 2023, with ongoing negative public opinion from figures like Zhang Xuefeng, reducing social application enthusiasm. Chinese Language and Literature was recommended in 2023, with stable popularity for basic liberal arts disciplines. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Estimated by historical proportion, there are about 140,000 History Category examinees, greatly expanding the competition base. Communication University of China is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangsu, so there is no provincial admission preference. The university's enrollment share in Jiangsu is about 2–3%, with cross-province applications less affected by regional preferences.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Combining the continuous downward trend of History Category rankings over the past three years, the slight 7.7% expansion in 2026 easing competition, the significant discouragement of Journalism and Communication majors reducing application willingness, and the about 46% surge in total examinees in Jiangsu intensifying competition, four factors interact: the expansion effect (pushing rankings higher) and the examinee surge effect (pulling rankings lower) offset each other, but the Journalism and Communication discouragement effect (pushing rankings higher) is more significant. Considering the major discouragement and examinee surge factors, the predicted minimum ranking is about 3250, with a range of 2750–3750.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2750–3750, focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Digital Publishing) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Network and New Media, Journalism, Advertising) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (English Experimental Class, Cultural Industry Management) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly above the upper limit (<2750), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the lower limit (>3750), focus mainly on Tier 3 majors.
